level_signals: End-to-end ownership of enterprise AI agent portfolio
Strategic advisor to executive teams at enterprise customers

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 6+ years of relevant experience (e.g., product manager, engagement manager, consultant, founder, etc.)
Deep technical acumen — able to understand and shape AI agent designs.
Comfort working in fast-moving, ambiguous environments where you shape solutions as much as you implement them.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: A Computer Science, Engineering, or Math degree — or equivalent technical experience.

scope.surface: Enterprise AI agent deployment and optimization across conversational channels (voice, chat, email, SMS)
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS, enterprise conversational AI platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Customer business impact from AI agents
Feature development informed by customer feedback
core_responsibilities: Build, Design and optimize Enterprise-quality AI agents in collaboration with customers — understanding their workflows, pain points, and goals.
Embed deeply within strategic customers to understand their business challenges and serve as a strategic advisor to their AI roadmap
Run tight feedback loops into Engineering — influence feature development based on real customer needs.
Represent Decagon externally — working closely with customers and prospects, participating in key deployments.
Writing and testing prompt logic for a specific customer use case
Working with a customer's executive team to define their AI roadmap

green_flags: Clear product ownership model — APMs own end-to-end agent portfolio
High-profile enterprise customers listed (Avis, Cash App, Chime, Oura Health)
Backed by top-tier investors (a16z, Accel, Bain Capital Ventures, Coatue, Index Ventures)
Equivalent experience accepted for technical degree requirement
red_flags: Explicitly in-office company with no city listed in JD — candidates cannot determine required location without further research
No visa sponsorship or work authorization details provided
Role blends PM, consultant, and AI expert functions — may have undefined scope in practice
Compensation range is very wide ($85K spread) — actual offer point unclear
